name: Apache Airflow
description: An open-source workflow orchestration platform for authoring, scheduling and monitoring data pipelines as code. Define your DAGs in Python and track every run in the built-in web UI.

aws.service: Amazon MWAA (Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow)
aws.parity: Amazon MWAA runs the same Airflow engine — your DAG files, operators, hooks and connections work without modification.
aws.deploy: Create an MWAA environment, upload your DAG folder to the associated S3 bucket and configure the same Connections and Variables via the Airflow UI or Secrets Manager.

variables.label: Web UI Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Airflow web UI.

variables.label: Admin Username
variables.description: Username for the Airflow admin account.

variables.label: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for the Airflow admin account.
